name: Puzzlo Word
description: App Store & Play Store screenshots for a daily word puzzle game. Hand-drawn scrapbook style with watercolor washes, Caveat marker headlines, ink brush underlines, sketch arrows, sticky notes and dark tilted game screens.

elements.name: Subtext
elements.content:
A fresh daily mystery
you can finish in minutes.

elements.name: Note text
elements.content:
✓ New puzzle every day
✓ Quick, bite-sized fun
✓ Play anytime, anywhere

elements.name: Subtext
elements.content:
Guess early for a higher score,
or unlock more clues.

elements.name: Note text
elements.content:
✓ Unscramble the clue
✓ Reveal its connection
✓ Guess when you know

elements.name: Subtext
elements.content:
See wins, streaks,
and which clue you solved on.

elements.name: Note text
elements.content:
✓ Build your streak
✓ See your win rate
✓ Spot your best strategy

elements.name: Subtext
elements.content:
Climb the weekly league,
or just beat your own streak.

elements.name: Note text
elements.content:
✓ Weekly leagues
✓ Global leaderboard
✓ Nudge a friend

elements.name: Subtext
elements.content:
Every solve earns coins,
hints are always close.

elements.name: Note text
elements.content:
✓ Earn coins every solve
✓ Spend them your way
✓ Keep your streak alive
